title: A11y Eval Deprecated: AutoRegisterBug Guard on Use
desc: a11y eval action is deprecated and scheduled for removal; AutoRegisterBug fires on every call, creating a bug-auto suggest entry to track callers. Migrate callers to a11y read/type/set-value.
steps: a11y eval is deprecated. When called, it prints '[DEPRECATED] a11y eval is scheduled for removal' to stderr and calls AutoRegisterBug() to create a bug-auto suggest entry. This allows tracking which callers still use eval.

To migrate away from eval: replace 'a11y eval <hwnd>' with 'a11y read <grap>' to read element value, or 'a11y type <grap> <text>' to type text. The eval action evaluated JS-like expressions -- use explicit actions instead.

If bug-auto USAGE-DEPRECATED suggests keep appearing, find the scenario YAML or script that calls 'a11y eval' and replace it. Use 'wkappbot file grep eval --path scenarios --type yaml' to locate callers.

requirements.expect: USAGE-DEPRECATED BUG-AUTO registered on each use
requirements.prompt: USAGE-DEPRECATED a11y eval: BUG-AUTO guard working as expected. Backward compat maintained.
USAGE-DEPRECATED a11y eval: BUG-AUTO guard working as expected. Backward compat maintained.

author: claude
